name: OptimizeRx Corp
summary: OptimizeRx Corp (OPRX) is a digital health company that enables life sciences companies to communicate with healthcare providers through electronic health record (EHR) systems and other digital health platforms. The company delivers clinical and financial messages, patient support resources, and branded communications directly within physician workflows, helping pharmaceutical and biotech companies reach providers at the point of care.
